channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [CFEL] Confidence Futuristic Energetech: FY26 Audited Results Approved
item.description:
Confidence Futuristic Energetech Ltd's board approved the audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for the fourth quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board also recommended a final dividend of 5% (₹0.25 per equity share), subject to shareholder approval. The audit report has an unmodified opinion. The meeting commenced at 04:00 PM and concluded at 22:55 PM on May 16, 2026.

  • Audited financial results for FY26 approved by the board.
  • Final dividend of 5% (₹0.25 per share) recommended.
  • Auditors issued an unmodified opinion on the financial results.
  • Meeting concluded on May 16, 2026 at 22:55 PM.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Confidence Futuristic Energetech Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [DODLA] Dodla Dairy FY26 Revenue Up 10.9% YoY to ₹41,252 Mn
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Dodla Dairy Ltd reported its audited financial results for Q4 & FY26. The company achieved its highest-ever quarterly and yearly revenue, with FY26 revenue reaching ₹41,252 Mn, an 10.9% increase YoY. Milk sales volume also reached a record high of 14.0 LLPD, up 19.5% YoY. While revenue increased, EBITDA and PAT margins experienced declines due to elevated milk procurement costs not fully passed on to consumers. The Africa business showed strong revenue growth of 48% YoY.

  • FY26 revenue reached ₹41,252 Mn, up 10.9% YoY.
  • Milk sales volume hit a record 14.0 LLPD, a 19.5% YoY increase.
  • Q4FY26 VAP contribution (excluding bulk sales) stood at 28%.
  • Africa business reported a robust 48% YoY revenue growth.
  • EBITDA margin decreased to 7.5% and PAT margin to 6.5% due to rising procurement costs.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Dodla Dairy Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [KEC] KEC Int'l FY26: Record ₹23,506 Cr Revenue, 275% Dividend
item.description:
🔥 Trending

KEC International Ltd. announced its financial results for Q4 and FY26 ended March 31, 2026. The company reported record revenues of ₹23,506 crore, an 8% increase YoY, and an all-time high order intake of ₹25,280 crore. The company's operating PAT grew by 18% in FY26. The Board recommended a dividend of 275%, or ₹5.5 per share. Net debt stood at ₹6,722 crore as of March 31, 2026, a reduction of ₹84 crore compared to December 31, 2025.

  • KEC International's FY26 revenue reached a record ₹23,506 crore, up 8% YoY.
  • The company achieved its highest-ever order intake of ₹25,280 crore in FY26.
  • Operating PAT increased by 18% in FY26.
  • A dividend of 275% (₹5.5 per share) was recommended for FY26.
  • Order book & L1 position stands at over ₹40,000 crore.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KEC INTERNATIONAL LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [KEC] KEC International: Merger of KEC Spur Approved
item.description:
🔥 Trending

The Board of Directors of KEC International Ltd approved a Scheme of Merger by Absorption of its wholly-owned subsidiary, KEC Spur Infrastructure Private Limited, subject to requisite approvals including the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal, Mumbai. The merger aims to create an operationally efficient group structure and strengthen the company’s consolidated business framework, leading to operational synergies and enhanced scalability.

  • KEC International to merge with its wholly-owned subsidiary, KEC Spur Infrastructure.
  • The merger is subject to approvals, including from the National Company Law Tribunal.
  • The merger aims to create operational efficiencies and strengthen the business framework.
  • No consideration is involved as KEC Spur is a wholly-owned subsidiary.
  • The merger will not result in any change in the shareholding pattern of KEC International.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KEC INTERNATIONAL LTD. | Category: Merger

item.title: [RCL] Radhagobind Commercial: Outcome of 8th COC Meeting
item.description:
The 8th meeting of the Committee of Creditors (CoC) of Radhagobind Commercial Limited was held on May 16, 2026. Key discussions included the progress of the Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP), specifically regarding the NCLT order for extension. The CoC approved the appointment of a legal consultant for due diligence of submitted Resolution Plans. The meeting also addressed CIRP costs and interim finance from financial creditors. The meeting commenced at 5:00 pm and concluded at 6:00 pm.

  • 8th CoC meeting of Radhagobind Commercial Ltd held on May 16, 2026.
  • Progress of CIRP discussed, including NCLT order for extension.
  • Appointment of legal consultant approved for Resolution Plan due diligence.
  • CIRP costs and interim finance from financial creditors discussed.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Radhagobind Commercial Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [WCIL] Western Carriers FY26 PAT at ₹39 Cr, Revenue ₹1,829 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Western Carriers (India) Ltd reports audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. FY26 revenue from operations stood at ₹1,829 Cr. EBITDA for FY26 was ₹85 crores, with a margin of 4.6%. Profit after tax (PAT) for FY26 reached ₹39 crores, with a margin of 2.1%. Q4 FY26 revenue was ₹496 Cr, EBITDA ₹21 Cr and PAT ₹8 Cr.

  • Q4 FY26 revenue from operations stood at ₹496 crores, up 4% QoQ.
  • Q4 FY26 EBITDA was ₹21 crores, with a margin of 4.3%.
  • Q4 FY26 PAT reached ₹8 crores, with a PAT margin of 1.7%.
  • FY26 EBITDA stood at ₹85 crores, with a margin of 4.6%.
  • FY26 PAT stood at ₹39 crores, with a margin of 2.1%.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Western Carriers (India) Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [INDSOYA] Apollo Ingredients Revises Audited Results: Face Value Error
item.description:
Apollo Ingredients Ltd. has revised its audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, due to a clerical error. The face value of equity shares was incorrectly stated as ₹10/- instead of the correct value of ₹5/-. The company has submitted the revised outcome of the Board Meeting with corrected financial results, clarifying that the correction is purely clerical and does not impact the company's financial performance or other disclosures. Other board decisions include director changes, remuneration approval, and office relocation.

  • Apollo Ingredients corrected the face value of equity shares to ₹5/- from ₹10/- in audited results.
  • The revision is due to a clerical error and does not affect financial performance.
  • James Mody resigned as a non-executive director.
  • Amol Dinkar Nigudkar was appointed as an Independent Director.
  • Kirit Ghanshyam Mutreja appointed as Managing Director.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDSOYA LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [KEC] KEC International: FY26 Dividend of ₹5.50 Recommended
item.description:
KEC International Ltd's board approved the audited consolidated and standalone financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. A dividend of ₹5.50 per equity share (275% of face value of ₹2 each) was recommended for declaration at the upcoming Annual General Meeting. The dividend will be paid within 30 days of declaration. The board meeting was held on May 16, 2026, from 03.30 p.m. to 07.45 p.m.

  • Audited financial results for FY26 approved by the board.
  • Dividend of ₹5.50 per share recommended for FY26.
  • Price Waterhouse Chartered Accountants LLP are the statutory auditors.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KEC INTERNATIONAL LTD. | Category: Dividend

item.title: [DODLA] Dodla Dairy: AGM on July 14, 2026; Dividend Record Date July 7
item.description:
Dodla Dairy Ltd will hold its 31st Annual General Meeting (AGM) via video conferencing on July 14, 2026. The record date for determining entitlement to the final dividend for FY 2025-26, if approved at the AGM, is fixed as July 7, 2026. The dividend will be paid within 30 days of declaration, subject to tax deduction. The AGM notice and annual report for FY 2025-26 will be sent electronically to registered members.

  • Dodla Dairy's 31st AGM will be held on July 14, 2026, via video conferencing.
  • Record date for final dividend (FY 2025-26), if approved, is July 7, 2026.
  • Dividend payment will be within 30 days of declaration, subject to tax.
  • AGM notice and annual report for FY 2025-26 will be sent electronically.
  • Members are requested to update their PAN and KYC details with the company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Dodla Dairy Ltd | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [KEC] KEC Int'l Appoints Deloitte as Statutory Auditor
item.description:
KEC International Ltd has appointed Deloitte Haskins & Sells Chartered Accountants LLP as its Statutory Auditors for a term of five consecutive years, commencing from the conclusion of the 22nd Annual General Meeting (AGM) to be held in 2027 until the conclusion of the 27th AGM in 2032, subject to member approval. The current Statutory Auditor, Price Waterhouse Chartered Accountants LLP, will continue until the 22nd AGM. The decision was made based on the recommendation of the Audit Committee and approved by the Board of Directors at its meeting on May 16, 2026.

  • Deloitte Haskins & Sells appointed as Statutory Auditors for 5 years.
  • Appointment subject to member approval at the 22nd AGM in 2027.
  • Price Waterhouse to continue as auditor until the 22nd AGM.
  • Board meeting approved the appointment on May 16, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KEC INTERNATIONAL LTD. | Category: Auditor
